inputs.label: Transaction Amount
inputs.businessContext: Total amount of the transaction including taxes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total amount of the transaction including taxes.

inputs.label: Processing Fee Percentage
inputs.businessContext: The percentage fee for domestic card processing (e.g., 2.9% for Stripe).

businessContext_i18n.en: The percentage fee for domestic card processing (e.g., 2.9% for Stripe).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yerel kart işleme için yüzde ücreti (örn., Stripe için %2,9).

inputs.label: Fixed Fee
inputs.businessContext: The fixed fee per transaction (e.g., $0.30 for Stripe).

businessContext_i18n.en: The fixed fee per transaction (e.g., $0.30 for Stripe).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşlem başına sabit ücret (örn., Stripe için $0,30).

inputs.label: Additional Fee Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Additional percentage for international cards or currency conversion (Stripe adds 1% for international, another 1% for conversion if needed).

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional percentage for international cards or currency conversion (Stripe adds 1% for international, another 1% for conversion if needed).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uluslararası kartlar veya para birimi dönüşümü için ek yüzde (Stripe uluslararası için %1, gerekirse dönüşüm için ek %1 ekler).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
